subcodes.first_line: O thou servant nigh unto the Court of Grandeur! Thy letter was received and its perusal brought the utmost joy [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده مقرب درگاه کبریا نامه شما رسید از قرائتش نهایت انبساط حصول یافت زیرا
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @prayer for protection, @station; mission; authority of Abdu'l-Baha, @review of publications
